name: Triple Chocolate Bundt Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour a bundt pan.
2. Mix the cake mix, pudding, eggs, and oil together in a large bowl. Beat for a few minutes until well combined.
3. Stir in the chocolate chips and nuts.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared bundt pan.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
